When you're learning a new language (currently Spanish), do you prefer immersion-based learning (speaking with natives, watching content without subtitles) or structured lessons (grammar drills, apps like Duolingo)? What has worked best for you so far?
What does your ideal morning look like from the moment you wake up until you start work? Walk me through your routine — coffee first? Exercise? Reading? Just coffee and jump into calls?

When you buy clothes, are you more of an 'invest in one quality piece' person or a 'find something decent at a reasonable price and replace later' person? How do you balance durability with the reality of travel wear and tear?
What are your preferences when it comes to weather and climate? Do you like it dry or humid? How hot is too hot for you? Do you seek out places with distinct seasons or prefer year-round consistency?

What does your ideal vacation or extended break look like? Are you someone who plans every detail in advance, or do you prefer to figure it out as you go? Big city exploration, beach relaxation, adventure sports, or visiting friends and family?

What does your daily movement or exercise routine look like these days? Do you have a specific workout you do, like running, CrossFit, yoga, swimming, or something else? Do you prefer working out alone or with others?

When you're buying something — whether it's a new gadget, a piece of furniture, or even groceries — how do you factor in sustainability? Are there specific brands you prefer for being more ethical, or types of products where sustainability matters more to you?

What's your approach to transportation when you're living somewhere? Do you typically rent a car, buy one, rely on public transit, or just use bikes/scooters and ride-shares? Any preferences around car type or features?
What kinds of video games do you enjoy — if any? Are you into competitive games, story-driven single-player games, casual mobile games, board games? Do you game solo or prefer playing with friends?

Do you have any mental frameworks, decision-making models, or productivity philosophies that you consciously use? Things like Stoicism, the 80/20 rule, specific planning systems, or anything you return to when thinking through big choices?

What's your go-to order at a coffee shop? Like, when you need caffeine and a change of scenery — do you get something consistent every time, or do you mix it up based on mood/season? Any specific drink that hits different?

When you're shopping for yourself — not gifts for someone else — how do you prefer to do it? Are you someone who researches the hell out of something before buying, or do you more like to see it in person and decide on the spot? Online vs. in-store for different types of things?

How do you handle the seasonal switch between Mexico and the US? Like, do you have a ritual or checklist for when you leave one place and go to the other? Any specific way you prep mentally or practically for that big of a change every few months?

Do you have any outdoor or nature-related activities you like to do when you're not working? Like hiking, swimming, surfing, running outside, or just hanging out in parks/nature? Any preference for the type of nature experience?

What about podcasts, YouTube channels, or newsletters — is there anything you regularly consume for learning or just for fun? Any specific creators or shows you'd recommend to someone who knows what you like?
What's your approach to alcohol — do you drink socially, have a go-to drink, or steer clear entirely? Any preferences around beer, wine, cocktails, or spirits?

When you buy things, how important is it to you that a brand or company aligns with your values (fair trade, ethical labor, local production, etc.)? Is there a price point or product category where you care more about this?

What does your living space need to feel like 'home' to you? Are there specific decorative elements, colors, or vibes (minimalist, cozy, modern, etc.) that make a place feel right? Any must-have items you try to bring with you?
What kind of reading do you enjoy — fiction, non-fiction, both? Any favorite genres or authors? Do you prefer physical books, e-readers, or audiobooks?
What are your news and information habits — do you follow specific outlets, podcasts, newsletters, or influencers? Any sources you trust for tech news, world events, or just interesting reads?
